result.stdout:
Vitruvian CLI arguments:
  --help
  --setup
  --list-modules
  --install-module <path|package@version> [--allow-unsigned]
  --unregister-module <domain>
  --configure-modules
  --model <provider[:model]>  (e.g. --model openai or --model anthropic:claude-3-5-sonnet-latest)
  --inspect-module <path|package@version> [--json] (alias: inspect-module)
  --doctor [--json] (alias: doctor)
  --policy validate <policyFile> (alias: policy validate)
  --policy explain <request> (alias: policy explain)
  --audit list (alias: audit list)
  --audit show <id> [--json] (alias: audit show)
  --replay <id> [--no-exec] (alias: replay)
  --new-module <Name> [OutputPath]

Getting started:
  1) Vitruvian --setup
  2) Vitruvian
  3) In interactive mode, type /help for commands or 'quit' to exit.
